name: Jira
description: Issue tracking and change management platform (Jira Cloud).

steps.action: Navigate to Jira and open the relevant project board (e.g., Change Management, IT Operations)
Create a JQL filter for change management evidence: project = 'CM' AND created >= -7d ORDER BY created DESC
steps.audit_note: Save this filter for consistent weekly collections; JQL filters are auditable

steps.action: Click the Export icon (top-right) and select 'Export Excel CSV (all fields)' to download the filtered results
For approval evidence, open individual tickets and screenshot the workflow transitions showing approver names and timestamps
steps.audit_note: Jira workflow transitions include user and timestamp metadata

steps.action: Upload the CSV export and any approval screenshots to the evidence repository with the evidence ID reference
Save a JQL filter for change management evidence: project = CHANGE AND status changed DURING (startOfWeek(), endOfWeek())
Configure Jira Automation rule to export the saved filter results as CSV weekly and email to evidence mailbox
Set up a Confluence page that auto-embeds the JQL results as a living change log
steps.audit_note: Confluence page provides persistent, auditable evidence trail

steps.action: Create Jira API token and configure automated script to query /rest/api/3/search with JQL for change/incident tickets
steps.permissions_required: API token with Browse Projects permission

steps.action: Automate daily extraction of change records with approval chains, implementation dates, and rollback status
Implement data validation — verify all changes have required fields: approver, change type, risk rating
Configure webhook for real-time change tracking to evidence platform
steps.audit_note: Real-time tracking eliminates gaps between change execution and evidence capture

steps.action: Build change management metrics dashboard: change frequency, approval cycle time, emergency change ratio, rollback rate
Implement automated CAB (Change Advisory Board) compliance checking — flag changes missing required approvals
Create trend analysis: compare change success rates month-over-month, identify problematic change categories
Generate automated monthly change management evidence report with KPIs and trend charts
